posts.text:
.@RepAndyBiggsAZ just introduced a bill that would abolish OSHA and workplace safety regulations that protect workers, including first responders, from preventable workplace dangers. But sure, Andrew, go off on how much you care about protecting life, you fucking hypocrite


Rep Andy Biggs (@RepAndyBiggsAZ)

Life is precious and fragile. What happened at Reagan National tonight is tragic.

Please join me in praying for the victims and their loved ones. 

Thank you to all of the first responders

Per the @splcenter : @CIS_org 's much-touted tagline is “low immigration, pro-immigrant,” but the organization has a decades-long history of circulating racist writers, while also associating with white nationalists. @NPR @NPRJoel These are your 'experts'? splcenter.org/resources/extr…

hey @NPR @NPRJoel , @CIS_org is called the same thing here--you're playing directly into the playbook that gives legitimacy to far right extremists in "think tanks" by treating them like experts npr.org/2025/01/24/nx-s1-527…

hey @NPR @NPRJoel says @BrennanCenter is a “left-leaning nonprofit” while @CIS_org, founded by a eugenicist/white nationalist, dubbed by SPLC a hate group, is “a think tank that favors lower levels of immigration" and gives them equal authority 🧵 npr.org/2025/01/27/nx-s1-527…

Today's video is a plea to those of you sitting out this election, or voting third party: please don't. So much is at stake. piped.video/0opAYZGxJD8
in which I publicly bully @elonmusk piped.video/SbYeTdz_JTc

You love to see it. For reference, this is the same guy who put @libsoftiktok on the Oklahoma state library advisory committee despite the fact that she doesn’t live there, has no connection there, and no evidence exists to indicate she’s ever read a book newrepublic.com/post/187272/…

Can confirm, come give us a visit!


hasanabi (@hasanthehun)

tim walz has convinced me that minnesota is significantly better than most other places in the nation. dont know what this means for the national race.
